abilities.shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.

abilities.shortEffect: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
abilities.effect:
Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Defense.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
